highlights.text:
We purchased Garrett Motion, ticker symbol GTX, in 2020, when it was going through bankruptcy
and it's the largest special situation in our portfolios.
highlights.quote:
We purchased Garrett Motion, ticker symbol GTX, in 2020, when it was going through bankruptcy
and it's the largest special situation in our portfolios.

highlights.text:
Earlier this month, my co-host and I traveled to New York City and attended FRMO's annual
shareholder meeting, highlights from the trip included iconic sightseeing, lunch
with two friends from Horizon Kinetics, and meeting Maurice Stahl.
highlights.quote:
Earlier this month, my co-host and I traveled to New York City and attended FRMO's annual
shareholder meeting, highlights from the trip included iconic sightseeing, lunch
with two friends from Horizon

highlights.text:
It continues to confound us how few investors appreciate the unique wisdom of Maurice Stahl
and ignore what he and his team are building at Horizon Kinetics and FRMO.
highlights.quote:
It continues to confound us how few investors appreciate the unique wisdom of Maurice Stahl
and ignore what he and his team are building at Horizon Kinetics and FRMO.

highlights.text:
An audio, soon to be transcript, of Stahl's talk at the meeting is posted on FRMO's
website.
highlights.quote:
An audio, soon to be transcript, of Stahl's talk at the meeting is posted on FRMO's
website.

highlights.text:
Walking away from Eferomo's meeting, my co-host and I have increased respect for the
rising kinetics team and are more bullish on TPL, Landbridge, and Eferomo.
highlights.quote:
Walking away from Eferomo's meeting, my co-host and I have increased respect for the

highlights.text:
FRMO Corp, which stands for Financial Risk Management Organization,
is a low volume 325 million market cap investment holding company
that trades on the OTC pink sheet market.
highlights.quote:
FRMO Corp, which stands for Financial Risk Management Organization,
is a low volume 325 million market cap investment holding company
that trades on the OTC pink sheet market.

highlights.text: Stahl explained the intent behind FRMO at the 2012 annual shareholder meeting.
highlights.quote: Stahl explained the intent behind FRMO at the 2012 annual shareholder meeting.

highlights.text:
Horizon would sell FRMO Corporation a revenue interest in that product,
and if it was successful, the corporation would collect a certain amount of revenue from it
with very little associated expenses.
highlights.quote:

with very little associated expenses

highlights.text: Quote, you should not forget the objective of FRMO.
highlights.quote: Quote, you should not forget the objective of FRMO.

highlights.text:
The investment products of Horizon Asset Management proved successful and FRMO's
revenue streams materialized and grew.
highlights.quote:

revenue streams materialized and grew.

top_claims.claim: FRMO is a permanent-capital vehicle tied to the Horizon Kinetics ecosystem. Book value per share is about $8.55; the OTC quote near $6.70 is roughly 22% below book with negligible debt and high insider ownership. Reported earnings are noisy because unrealized investment gains drove Q3 FY2026 net income; that is not ope

*Primary risk: Investment A concentration (~82%) and fair-value mark-downs if MIH lockup, fund losses, or risk-off markets hit the consolidated position. [Fact] On January 15, 2026 FRMO announced that prior annual and certain interim financial statements should no longer be relied upon pending a deferred tax restatemen
Horizon franchise impairment: royalty stream shrinks.

Horizon franchise impairment: royalty stream shrinks.
